import io
import string
import list

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  for x in xs
    if not removed and x == target
      removed = true
    else
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn top_k(_ xs: List<Int>, _ k: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = remaining.len()
  let limit = if k < n
    k
  else
    n
  end
  mut i = 0
  while i < limit
    match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      remaining = remove_first(remaining, m)
    when None
      i = limit
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  for t in tokens
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn join_ints(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut s = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in xs
    if first
      s = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      s = "#{s} #{x}"
    end
  end
  s
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

let top = top_k(nums, k)
println(join_ints(top))
